description: This file contains functions for interacting with the 'mindmap_view_state' table in a MySQL database, including saving and loading a user's view state data for a mind map. It exports two main functions: saveViewState and loadViewState, and a default object exporting these functions.

methods.name: saveViewState({ userId, mapKey, state })
methods.description: Upserts a user's mind map view state into the database, inserting or updating the record, and returns a normalized record with the current timestamp.

methods.name: loadViewState({ userId, mapKey })
methods.description: Retrieves a user's mind map view state from the database; returns null if not found, or the parsed state if present.

ctags.name: saveViewState
ctags.pattern: /^export async function saveViewState({ userId, mapKey, state }) {$/
